comments.author: @garykinard7553
comments.text: If going on a one week or two week vacation make sure you go before or after the burning season. There are more people die in Thailand from air polution each year than any other cause. Horrible horrible country.

comments.author: @kumpolkumpolxxx6200
comments.text: รีบมาเที่ยวกันซะ ต่อไปจะไม่เหลืออะไรแล้ว ผู้มีอำนาจของไทยนำเข้าคนจีนเต็มประเทศเลย😢คนจีนทำแต่เรื่องร้ายๆ ทำลายทุกอย่างเพื่อผลประโยชน์ของตัวเอง😢

comments.text: Khmer empire ruled all Asia 8000 years, ruled Europe 4000 years. Cambodia empire is the biggest country in the world = 98.9 million km2. Thailand is province of Cambodia.

replies.author: @PoZd_96
replies.text: Wake up, little brother. Where did you hear that the Khmer ruled Asia for 8000 years? The whole world was in the Stone Age back then. How could there have been a Khmer empire? Get off the government-controlled internet first, little brother, before we talk about history. 😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂

comments.author: @gardofuentes363
comments.text: So happy to retire there in 2030 Valentines Day!  I'll just finish 2027 work strong, and then start my countdown in 2028.  Nothing beats Thailand for me.  Accommodations, food, spirituality, friendly locals, languagge to be learned, and year-round beaches, nature and animals.  Oh and the music is okay too.  No mariachi bands here creeping up while you're enjoying suntanning.
